title: LinkedIn Learning India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: LinkedIn Learning India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
